---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for TalkTeach
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Before filing: skim docs/ROADMAP.md — your idea may already be tracked there
with a tier and priority. Linking to it (or saying "not on the roadmap yet") is
the most useful thing you can do.
-->

## The problem / who it helps

What can't a user (often a child, sometimes the grown-up helping them) do today,
or what's painful? Describe the need, not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Which roadmap tier / priority does this map to?

<!-- See docs/ROADMAP.md. Tick the closest one. -->

- [ ] **P0** — makes training *real* (the core promise)
- [ ] **P0** — security / data integrity (before any release)
- [ ] **P1** — world-class MVP (real product)
- [ ] **P2** — robust & cross-platform
- [ ] **P3** — delight & scale
- [ ] **X** — cross-cutting engineering quality (CI, deps, docs, observability)
- [ ] Not on the roadmap yet / not sure

Existing roadmap item #, if any:

## Keep it child-proof and offline-first

How does this fit the product promises? In particular:

- Does it keep working **offline**, with **no GPU**?
- Does it keep children's recordings **on the device** (no telemetry/upload
  without explicit opt-in)?
- Does it stay simple enough for a 10-year-old in the main wizard (advanced
  knobs belong in Grown-up mode)?

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Per DECISIONS.md, non-obvious choices get top-5 options scored 0–100. If you
already have alternatives in mind, list them — it makes the decision entry easy. -->
